untranslatable_reason: Pattern requires identification of double-top formation with specific peak spacing (50+ days), height/width combinations, peak asymmetry analysis, and price variation between peaks. These chartist pattern recognition criteria cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume, Returns, Bar Properties). The signal requires custom pattern detection logic that identifies two distinct peaks, measures inter-peak spacing and height ratios, and analyzes asymmetry — functionality not available in standard technical indicators.
translation_notes: BULKOWSKI_DRY_0 describes a sophisticated candlestick pattern (EADT) requiring visual/structural pattern recognition beyond standard indicator library. Breakout direction is UP with 72% success rate in bear markets and 19% average decline on failures. Formation takes ~50 days. Recommend implementing custom pattern detector or using candlestick pattern library external to this rules engine.
